subcodes.first_line: Lo, the Tongue of the Dawn hath spoken: "Verily, there is none other God but I, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise." All things bear witness that there is no God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نطق لسان الصبح انه لا اله الا انا العلیم الحکیم قد شهدت الاشیاء انه لا اله
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @proclamation to the people of the world
